Google.ConsentHint: You will be redirected to Google to grant access to your calendars, then choose here which of them to show.
Google.ConfigurationHint: Google Calendar is not configured on this server — set the MITRA_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID and MITRA_GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET environment variables (see the README).
Notion.TokenHint: Create an integration at notion.so/profile/integrations, share your task databases with it (··· → Connections), then paste its secret here. A database needs a Status and a Date property — its views become sources.
